ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, OR( ISNEW() , ISBLANK( TEXT(ContractPartner__r.CurrencyIsoCode )), ISBLANK( TEXT(ProjectCurrency__c )) ),
OR( ISCHANGED(ProjectCurrency__c), ISBLANK( TEXT(ProjectCurrency__c )) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must choose a Project Currency. (PR007)
